title: Magnetic Stirrer with 4 PCS Stir Bars, Stir Plate 3000RPM Magnetic Mixer 3000mL Lab Stirrers (No Heating)
description:
【4 Stir Bars】 The magnetic Stirrer is equipped with 4 stir bars (1.18'' long). Compact size allows you to put it in most measuring cups.
【Longer Lifespan】 This magnetic stir plate's working plate is made of high quality 5052 Aluminum, It has a longer lifespan and is easy to clean.
【Stir Powerfully】 The Lab Stirrers' Max. stirring speed is 3000 RPM, you can adjust the stirring speed according to the type of solution. Max.capacity 3000ml , ideal for home brew yeast starters.
【Extensive application】The stir plate can be used for scientific research institutions/environmental protection industries/chemical experiments/health medicine/universities and colleges and other experimental scenarios.
【Contact us】If you have any questions, please contact us, we are always at your service.
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
The package arrived undamaged and on time. I’ll use this for mixing shellac. I use a coffee grinder to get the shellac into a powder, then I put the mixing jar on the flat surface. At this point I place the magnet into the jar, being careful to center the magnet in the center of the jar. I used a friends device and knew I had to have this. It makes mixing shellac so much faster. A great tool!It worked nicely!great in the lab for sterile mixing. Mixes 1 liter semi-viscous solutions with power to spare, or as easy as you like.I bought this to make shellac for woodworking. I can dissolve shellac flakes and distilled alcohol very quickly.A good quality magnetic stirrer happy with my purchase thank you.Great little stirring plate, works flawlessly and was a bargain.Works great with a small watering can and one of the magnets in the can. Able to easily mix a half gallon at a decent rate. Saves you time if you need to add multiple nutrients!So far the stirrer works as described. I use for homebrew starters in a 2L flask and two batches in and the stirrer seems to be working well. Would recommend buying for anyone after a stirrer for homebrewing.This product was perfect for dissolving powder into water for my fish tank dosing. I love that I can mix up to 3 liters at a time!i purchased for washing the resin prints.
works well for the miniatures.
sometimes keep stucked if not arranged well the prints.
reviews_1s: Plugged it in, turned knob all the way and only made the stir bar that came with it shake slightly. Used my own stir bar and the same thing happened. Didn’t even move the stir bar. Waste of money. Threw it in the trash.Worked for like 2 stirs then quit. Return process seems rediculous.Worked great at first but quit working in less than 3 months
